name: Blueberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, 1/2 cup sugar, dash salt, and butter in a bowl. Mix with a pastry blender until crumbs are formed.
2. Measure out 3/4 cup of the crumb mixture and set aside.
3. Mix the remaining crumb mixture with the egg yolk. Press this mixture over the bottom and sides of a greased 9-inch springform pan, about 3/4 inch up the sides.
4. Combine blueberries, lemon juice, remaining 1/2 cup sugar, tapioca, salt, and cinnamon in a separate bowl. Let stand for 15 minutes.
5. Spoon the blueberry mixture into the crumb-lined pan.
6. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 20 minutes.
7. Sprinkle the reserved 3/4 cup of crumbs over the top of the cake batter.
8. Continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the crumbs are golden brown.
